articles.title: 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 3-0 loss to Nashville SC
articles.description:
Having produced several recent comebacks, New England ran out of magic tricks against the top team in the Eastern Conference.

The post 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 3-0 loss to Nashville SC appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New England Revolution suffered a 3-0 defeat against Nashville SC on May 13.
Revolution's recent comeback trend ended against the top team in the Eastern Conference.
This loss may affect local fan morale and team standings in the playoffs.

articles.title: Massport to attempt Guinness World Record for world’s largest soccer ball
articles.description:
“Bringing this iconic display to East Boston gives people the opportunity to come together, enjoy the neighborhood’s vibrant waterfront and skyline views, and share in the excitement of the FIFA World Cup,” Rich Davey, Massport CEO, said.

The post Massport to attempt Guinness World Record for world’s largest soccer ball appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massport plans to create the world's largest soccer ball in East Boston.
The event aims to celebrate the FIFA World Cup and engage the community.
Residents can enjoy waterfront views and neighborhood activities during the event.

articles.title: Trump has fanfare-filled meeting with Xi in China, but major breakthroughs may be elusive
articles.description:
The pair shook hands and chatted, with Trump patting Xi on the arm before they posed for pictures.

The post Trump has fanfare-filled meeting with Xi in China, but major breakthroughs may be elusive appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump and Xi met in China, discussing trade and diplomatic relations.
No significant breakthroughs reported, impacting future trade negotiations for Boston businesses.
Local companies may face uncertainty due to ongoing trade tensions between the U.S. and China.

articles.title: Famous makeup artist gets backlash for mocking former Spirit Airlines employee at Logan over fundraiser
articles.description:
“Welcome to the real world, sweetheart. People lose their jobs every f—ing day," influencer James Charles said in a now-deleted video.

The post Famous makeup artist gets backlash for mocking former Spirit Airlines employee at Logan over fundraiser appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Makeup artist James Charles faced backlash for mocking a laid-off Spirit Airlines employee at Logan Airport.
Charles' video, posted on May 13, received significant criticism and was later deleted.
Local residents express concern over insensitivity towards job loss amid economic challenges in Boston.

articles.title: Rafaela’s pinch 2-run homer leads Red Sox over Phillies 3-1
articles.description:
Slumping Trevor Story hit a solo homer for the Red Sox, who had lost three of their previous four games.

The post Rafaela’s pinch 2-run homer leads Red Sox over Phillies 3-1 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rafaela hit a pinch-hit 2-run homer, securing a 3-1 victory for the Red Sox.
Trevor Story contributed with a solo homer, breaking a slump after three losses.
This win helps boost team morale as the Red Sox aim to improve their season.

articles.title: Photos: State trooper killed by wrong-way driver in Lynnfield crash laid to rest
articles.description:
Mourners gathered in Salem for funeral services for Kevin Trainor, a State Police trooper who was killed by a wrong-way driver in Lynnfield.

The post Photos: State trooper killed by wrong-way driver in Lynnfield crash laid to rest appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mourners honored State Trooper Kevin Trainor at his funeral in Salem on May 13.
Trainor was killed by a wrong-way driver in Lynnfield, raising safety concerns.
The incident highlights the dangers of impaired driving for Boston residents.

articles.title: Angell Animal Medical Center treating cat who fell 10 stories
articles.description:
“Cats with similar injuries who receive surgical treatment usually adapt well once they’ve recovered—they may just walk a bit differently,” a MSPCA-Angell doctor said.

The post Angell Animal Medical Center treating cat who fell 10 stories appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Angell Animal Medical Center is treating a cat that fell 10 stories.
MSPCA-Angell reports cats with similar injuries often adapt well post-surgery.
Local residents can expect improved animal care options at Angell Medical Center.
